title: TRACING LIGHT · DARK TIDE
description: A disruptive random gun-fighting FPS game centered on TACZ , featuring 14 different battle modes and breathtaking visual effects.
body:
# TRACING LIGHT · DARK TIDE ## A Random FPS Modpack Like No Other --- > **Ever felt buried under a mountain of gun mods — yet never really got to use most of them?** > > **Tired of manual loadouts that break both immersion and competitive balance?** ### 🎯 This is where randomness meets fairness. **Every respawn is a new random weapon.** Just pure, unpredictable gunfight action. > **Fair play. Full arsenal. One click. Endless fun.** ![NRG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa889bdfa7bb093d6f05aedcb5eaf9ff5f9c2b74_0.webp) --- ## 📌 **Project Status** **The official version of this project is complete as of v1.12.2.** All subsequent updates will be taken over by our successor **"Xingyin"**. Therefore, **any version released after v1.12.2 is considered unofficial**. > ⚠️ **Unofficial versions are not covered by official stability guarantees and may contain issues.** For **bug reports on unofficial builds** or to **access the latest beta versions**, please join our **QQ Development Group**: 👉 **`1074226823`** --- ## 🔥 **Immersive Gunfight Experience** > **14 maps · 10 random spawns per solo arena · Every match feels fresh** Each respawn gives you a completely different loadout and starting position — no two battles play the same. ![Summit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcc4f15778b0c2090a211d7c8cfa29f6d45ca244_0.webp) ![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2f3fa5e61c8f4db010dd9b51f00d58feff62b9.png) ## 💥 **Massive Arsenal** ![firearms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45faeffce78d2976342ccd3af6a07a79f356b71d_0.webp) | Category | Count | |:---|:---:| | Firearms | **400+** | | Attachments | **500+** | | Modern Vehicles | **10+** | - All weapons from **[TACZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero)** + addons - Vehicles from **[SUPERB WARFARE](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-warfare)** — stunning models, realistic physics - **Fully datapack-driven** — tweak everything with **VS Code** ![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2f3fa5e61c8f4db010dd9b51f00d58feff62b9.png) ## 🧬 **Built for Performance** > **800+ FPS on integrated graphics · Lightweight server · Admin-friendly** - **Extreme client optimization** — tested on iGPU - **Datapack-driven logic** — minimal server tick load - **One-command match control** — see "core command" below. ![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2f3fa5e61c8f4db010dd9b51f00d58feff62b9.png) ## 💓 **Game Modes** | Mode | Description | Players | |:---|:---|:---:| | **Team Deathmatch** | 15min — eliminate as many as possible | Unlimited | | **Free For All** | 15min — solo elimination | 2–10 | | **Team Extreme** | One life per round. First to 10 rounds wins | Unlimited | | **Manhunt** | Survivors vs Hunters — elimination turns sides | Unlimited | | **Knife Fight** | Only knife + grenade. Last one standing | 2–10 | | **Rocket Air Battle** | Aerial rocket duels | 2–10 | | **Classic Demolition** | CS2-style bomb planting — tactical 5v5 | 2–10 | ![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2f3fa5e61c8f4db010dd9b51f00d58feff62b9.png) ## 🎯 **How a Match Works**
Click to see the full competition flow 1. **Teams split** (team modes only) 2. **Match info broadcast** — map, mode, rules 3. **Random teleport** — fixed spawns for teams, 10 random points for solo 4. **Respawn buffs** — 3s invincibility, 100 HP, random full loadout 5. **Mid-match supplies** — every 2 minutes. 6. **Auto ranking & reset** — results announced, arena cleaned, ready for next match
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2f3fa5e61c8f4db010dd9b51f00d58feff62b9.png) ## ⚙️ **Core Commands** **You can start the game directly by double-clicking the item on the right side of the screen after opening the chat bar.** **Meanwhile, you can also use the following instructions:** ```mcfunction # Start a match — the word after "start" defines mode and map /function rgf:start/... # End the match early /function rgf:over ``` ![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2f3fa5e61c8f4db010dd9b51f00d58feff62b9.png) ## 🛠️ **Server Setup** [👉 [Download our official server core here](https://www.123865.com/s/IELXvd-9PvdH?notoken=1&pwd=NRGS)) ![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2f3fa5e61c8f4db010dd9b51f00d58feff62b9.png) ## ℹ️ **Important Notices**
Resource reuse & permissions - **All content except maps and weapon/gun packs** may be reused for **non-commercial purposes** - Maps and weapon packs are available from their original authors in the modding community > 💡 **Want only the core random gunfight system without maps/guns?** > Download the standalone [datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nrgd) **After downloading this modpack:** 1. All players must install it. The host simply opens a LAN world. 2. **Do not modify game files** — mismatches can break connections. 3. No anti-cheat — play with trusted friends.
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2f3fa5e61c8f4db010dd9b51f00d58feff62b9.png) ## ❓ **Q&A**
Quick answers **Q: Low FPS or crashes?** A: Turn off shaders. Vehicle model detail may cause drops — normal. **Q: Gun has no animation?** A: First, make sure that your gunpack is compatible with the server. If there is a mismatch, request the missing gunpack from the administrator and install it. If it matches, use the /tacz reload command in the single-player save file. **Q: Have a feature idea?** A: Share it on the issue feedback page — we'd love to hear it. **Q: Can I use files from this pack in my own project?** A: Yes — except for all gunpacks and maps. Those belong to their original authors.
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2f3fa5e61c8f4db010dd9b51f00d58feff62b9.png) ## 💬 **Bug Reports** Found an issue? Report it here: [👉 Bug Report Page](https://www.mcmod.cn/modpack/1173.html) > **Please include your modpack version and attach a valid screenshot!** ![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2f3fa5e61c8f4db010dd9b51f00d58feff62b9.png) ## 🙏 **Credits**
All contributors **🏆 Gunpack contributors:** ![gunpack contributors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65b2742c61d8431c3190cef6d989aed3a5c0100f_0.webp) **🎖️ Map contributors:** ![map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c084010eb7b83b4f27a2336af15bf46f7f73fee0.png) ![map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d546c9e802f1fae8e56d5b5a73997afb30102884_0.webp) **💡 Other contributors:** - Datapack inspiration: **Nox_Obscura, Amedazi** - Testers & volunteers: **Algal algae, Fungus, Yunju** > My deepest gratitude — this project wouldn't exist without them.
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2f3fa5e61c8f4db010dd9b51f00d58feff62b9.png) > **Thank you for playing.** > **The battlefield never sleeps — see you in the dark tide.** ![TKS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed0453033adffb0d3ca92f06bccf6077979ae6c7.png) ## 💡Join our community **QQ Development Group: `1074226823`**
